pattern.name: EHR with SMART on FHIR Gateway
pattern.description: Hospital EHR integrated with internal and third-party SMART on FHIR apps.

components.name: EHR Core
components.description: Primary clinical record and workflow platform.

components.name: FHIR API Gateway
components.description: OAuth2/OIDC and API mediation for SMART clients.

components.name: Third-party SMART Apps
components.description: External applications requesting scoped access tokens.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Token scope expansion and API privilege creep.
Partner compromise can drive data exfiltration and app impersonation.

weak_points.weak_point: Over-broad SMART scopes with long-lived refresh tokens
weak_points.rationale: Enables bulk extraction from mis-scoped applications.

weak_points.weak_point: Missing API-level audit granularity for patient-level reads
weak_points.rationale: Reduces breach detection and legal defensibility.

pattern.name: DICOM PACS Imaging Pipeline
pattern.description: Modalities send imaging studies to PACS/VNA and downstream viewers.

components.name: Imaging Modalities
components.description: CT/MRI/X-ray devices producing DICOM files.

components.name: PACS/VNA
components.description: Image storage and retrieval backbone.

components.name: Diagnostic Viewers
components.description: Radiology review workstations and web viewers.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Legacy device protocols and weak segmentation increase lateral movement risk.

weak_points.weak_point: Patient identifiers exposed in un-sanitized DICOM headers
weak_points.rationale: Metadata leakage can breach PHI with no pixel exfiltration.

pattern.name: EHR/EMR System
pattern.description: Canonical EHR pattern with integration engine and patient portal connectivity.

components.name: EHR Core
components.description: Main record-of-care and documentation system.

components.name: Integration Engine
components.description: HL7/FHIR mediation to downstream systems.

components.name: Patient Portal
components.description: Patient-facing access and messaging application.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Message trust assumptions can be exploited by malformed payloads.

weak_points.weak_point: Shared workstation sessions and weak session termination
weak_points.rationale: Enables insider misuse and account hijack in clinical areas.

pattern.name: Medical Imaging (PACS/VNA)
pattern.description: Imaging stack including modalities, archive, and viewer systems.

components.name: Imaging Modalities
components.description: Diagnostic imaging devices generating studies.

components.name: PACS/VNA Archive
components.description: Long-term storage and retrieval system.

components.name: Imaging AI Analysis
components.description: AI inference service for triage or diagnostic support.

trust_boundaries.boundary_name: Device Network to Core Imaging Boundary
trust_boundaries.risk_note: Legacy imaging protocols and vendor credentials can enable lateral movement.

weak_points.weak_point: Uncontrolled DICOM metadata exposure in exports
weak_points.rationale: Sensitive patient identifiers leak outside intended scope.

pattern.name: Internet of Medical Things
pattern.description: Networked bedside and treatment devices managed through biomedical gateways.

components.name: Bedside/Clinical Devices
components.description: Infusion pumps, monitors, ventilators, and similar connected devices.

components.name: Device Gateway
components.description: Fleet management and telemetry aggregation.

components.name: Biomedical Management Console
components.description: Operational console for provisioning and patch workflows.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Weak segmentation enables ransomware propagation into patient-care devices.

weak_points.weak_point: Legacy device firmware and unsupported patch cycles
weak_points.rationale: Raises exploitability with direct patient safety implications.

pattern.name: Laboratory Information System
pattern.description: Laboratory analyzers integrated with LIS and EHR results channels.

components.name: Lab Analyzers
components.description: Instruments generating lab observations and measurements.

components.name: LIS Core
components.description: Laboratory workflow, validation, and result publication.

components.name: EHR Interface
components.description: Results integration with EHR systems.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Message integrity failures can alter diagnostic result streams.

weak_points.weak_point: Weak integrity checks on analyzer-to-LIS data
weak_points.rationale: Potential false results can produce patient harm.

pattern.name: Pharmacy System
pattern.description: E-prescribing and dispensing stack with controlled-substance tracking.

components.name: E-prescribing Service
components.description: Prescriber order creation and transmission.

components.name: Dispensing System
components.description: Medication fill and dispense workflows.

components.name: Controlled Substance Registry Link
components.description: State/regional controlled-substance tracking integration.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Credential misuse can enable diversion and fraud workflows.

weak_points.weak_point: Insufficient anti-fraud controls for controlled substance workflows
weak_points.rationale: Medication diversion and unauthorized prescribing risk increases.

pattern.name: Telehealth Platform
pattern.description: Video consultation and remote monitoring with clinician and patient apps.

components.name: Video Consultation Service
components.description: Session media and signaling services.

components.name: Clinician Portal
components.description: Clinician interaction and documentation interface.

components.name: Remote Monitoring Ingestion
components.description: Receives patient-generated telemetry and device feeds.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Session hijacking and weak identity proofing can expose sensitive consultations.

weak_points.weak_point: Inadequate identity proofing and consent capture for remote sessions
weak_points.rationale: Can violate telehealth consent and privacy requirements.

pattern.name: Health Information Exchange
pattern.description: Cross-organization exchange with consent, registry, and query/retrieve services.

components.name: Master Patient Index
components.description: Identity correlation across participating organizations.

components.name: Consent Management
components.description: Consent rules and patient authorization states.

components.name: Edge Gateway
components.description: Boundary control for organization ingress/egress.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Cross-organization trust and token validation weaknesses can expose broad patient cohorts.

weak_points.weak_point: Consent state mismatch across participant systems

pattern.name: Clinical AI/ML Pipeline
pattern.description: Model training, registry, and inference workflows for clinical support systems.

components.name: Training Data Pipeline
components.description: Feature extraction and model training workflow.

components.name: Model Registry
components.description: Model artifact storage and version management.

components.name: Inference API
components.description: Runtime clinical inference service.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Unverified model promotion can inject unsafe or biased clinical behavior.

weak_points.weak_point: Model drift without safety guardrails and override pathways
weak_points.rationale: Can produce sustained clinical misclassification and harm.

pattern.name: Patient Portal / PHR
pattern.description: Patient-facing record access, messaging, scheduling, and upload services.

components.name: Portal Frontend
components.description: Patient-facing web and mobile interface.

components.name: Authentication Service
components.description: User authentication and proxy access management.

components.name: Portal API
components.description: Data access gateway to clinical systems.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Credential stuffing and session theft can lead to account compromise.

weak_points.rationale: Can expose dependent and family records improperly.

pattern.name: Radiology Information System
pattern.description: Scheduling, workflow, reporting, and PACS-linked radiology operations.

components.name: RIS Scheduling
components.description: Order and appointment management for imaging workflows.

components.name: RIS Reporting
components.description: Radiology report generation and physician communication.

components.name: PACS Integration
components.description: Image/report synchronization with PACS.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Report/image linkage tampering can create diagnostic integrity failures.

weak_points.weak_point: Order/report mismatch due to weak integrity controls
weak_points.rationale: Can propagate diagnostic mistakes and patient safety events.

pattern.name: Software as Medical Device
pattern.description: Regulated software lifecycle with clinical algorithm, updates, and post-market monitoring.

components.name: SaMD Core Service
components.description: Core decision logic and workflow functions.

components.name: Update Mechanism
components.description: Software update and patch distribution channel.

components.name: Post-market Surveillance
components.description: Safety and vulnerability telemetry monitoring pipeline.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Compromised update channel can inject malicious or unsafe logic into clinical systems.

weak_points.weak_point: Weak software provenance and signature validation
weak_points.rationale: Introduces direct patient safety and regulatory risk.

pattern.name: Genomics/Precision Medicine
pattern.description: Sequencing, variant interpretation, consent, and biobank-integrated precision medicine workflows.

components.name: Sequencing Pipeline
components.description: Raw read processing and variant calling pipeline.

components.name: Clinical Interpretation
components.description: Clinical interpretation and reporting module.

components.name: Consent Tracking
components.description: Granular patient consent and data permit tracking.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Research data reuse without robust consent controls risks unlawful processing.

weak_points.rationale: Pseudonymization may be insufficient for genomic uniqueness.

pattern.name: Healthcare ERP/Revenue Cycle
pattern.description: Registration, billing, claims, and clearinghouse integrations in healthcare operations.

components.name: Patient Registration
components.description: Patient intake and demographic capture.

components.name: Claims Engine
components.description: Claim generation and payer submission workflows.

components.name: Clearinghouse Integration
components.description: Electronic claims and remittance exchange.

trust_boundaries.risk_note: Third-party compromise can expose financial and health data at scale.

weak_points.weak_point: High concentration risk in billing and clearinghouse integrations
weak_points.rationale: Operational disruption and data exposure can cascade across revenue cycle operations.
